entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop used as a component in the intercrop experiment

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop used as a component in the intercrop experiment

entities.name: INTERCROP
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops in proximity, specifically sorghum and groundnut

entities.name: CROP PERFORMANCE RATIO
entities.description: A ratio defined as the productivity of an intercrop per unit area compared with that expected from sole crops

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of output per unit area of ground

entities.name: INTERCEPTED RADIATION
entities.description: The amount of solar radiation captured by the crop canopy

entities.name: SEASONAL TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The total amount of water transpired by the crop over the growing season

entities.name: CONVERSION COEFFICIENTS FOR RADIATION
entities.description: Coefficients used to relate intercepted radiation to dry matter production

entities.name: DRY MATTER/WATER RATIOS
entities.description: The ratio of dry matter produced to the amount of water transpired

entities.name: TOTAL DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The total mass of dry plant material produced

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE YIELD
entities.description: The yield of the economically useful reproductive parts of the plant

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of reproductive yield to total dry weight
